title: Bhongir Fort
tagline: Bhongir Fort — heritage city of Telangana

overview.short: Bhongir Fort, also known as Bhuvanagiri Fort is a fort located in the heart of Bhongir a town in Yadadri Bhuvanagiri district, Telangana, India.
overview.description: Bhongir Fort, also known as Bhuvanagiri Fort is a fort located in the heart of Bhongir a town in Yadadri Bhuvanagiri district, Telangana, India. It is located on a huge rock at a commanding height. 47 km from Hyderabad.

topPlaces.name: Bhongir
topPlaces.description: Bhongir, also known as Bhuvanagiri or Bhongiri, is a city and a district headquarters of the Yadadri Bhuvanagiri district and part of the Hyderabad Metropolitan Region of the Indian state of Telangana.

topPlaces.name: Yadadri Bhuvanagiri
topPlaces.description: Yadadri Bhuvanagiri district is a district in the Indian state of Telangana. The administrative headquarters is located at Bhuvanagiri which is also known as Bhongiri.

topPlaces.name: Gangasanipally
topPlaces.description: Gangasanipally is a village in Yadadri Bhuvanagiri district of Telangana, India. It falls under Bhongir mandal.

topPlaces.name: Wadaigudem
topPlaces.description: Wadaigudem is a village in Yadadri Bhuvanagiri district of Telangana, India. It falls under Bhuvanagiri mandal.

topPlaces.name: Bommaipally
topPlaces.description: Bommaipally is a village in Yadadri district of the Indian state of Telangana. It is administered under Bhuvanagiri Municipality & Mandal of Bhongir revenue division.

topPlaces.name: Muthireddigudem
topPlaces.description: Muthireddigudem is a village in Yadadri Bhuvanagiri district. It falls under Bhongir mandal.

topPlaces.name: Thukkapur, Bhongir mandal
topPlaces.description: Thukkapur is a village in Yadadri Bhuvanagiri district of Telangana, India. It falls under Bhongir mandal.

topPlaces.name: Hanumapur
topPlaces.description: Hanumapur is a village in Bhongir mandal, Yadadri Bhuvanagiri district of Telangana, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Bhongir Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Bhongir Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Bhongir Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Rajiv Gandhi International Airport, Hyderabad (58 km) and the nearest railway station is Secunderabad Junction (Hyderabad) (42 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Bhongir Fort?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Bhongir Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Bhongir Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Bhongir Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Bhongir Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Bhongir, Yadadri Bhuvanagiri, Gangasanipally, Wadaigudem, Bommaipally.
